calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Intention To Move For New Trial
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DANIEL LONG's Motion For New Trial is denied. The court did not err by finding that the doctrine of equitable tolling did not apply to this case. Plaintiff did not act in good faith and reasonably. Plaintiff had a viable state court action that was litigated for two years and about to go to trial. It was prejudicial to defendant and not in good faith for plaintiff to dismiss that case on the eve of trial, then attempt to litigate the matter in federal court, and then subsequently file a repetitive second state court action. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =(302/EHG)
